narrative:
Mtta West (precinct in Washington County) has 36 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.6%, a clear Democratic lean of 11.1 percentage points.
